mapper.select: SELECT scenario_id AS "scenarioId", name, status, drone_count AS "droneCount", topology_mode AS "topologyMode", motion_mode AS "motionMode", publish_interval_ms AS "publishIntervalMs", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM sim_scenarios ORDER BY CASE WHEN name = '默认演示场景' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, updated_at DESC, scenario_id DESC

SELECT scenario_id AS scenarioId, name, description, status, drone_count AS droneCount, publish_interval_ms AS publishIntervalMs, area_center_lat AS areaCenterLat, area_center_lon AS areaCenterLon, area_radius_m AS areaRadiusM, battery_min AS batteryMin, battery_max AS batteryMax, rssi_min AS rssiMin, rssi_max AS rssiMax, alt_min AS altMin, alt_max AS altMax, topology_mode AS topologyMode, motion_mode AS motionMode, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sim_scenarios WHERE name = #{name} ORDER BY scenario_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT scenario_id AS scenarioId, name, description, status, drone_count AS droneCount, publish_interval_ms AS publishIntervalMs, area_center_lat AS areaCenterLat, area_center_lon AS areaCenterLon, area_radius_m AS areaRadiusM, battery_min AS batteryMin, battery_max AS batteryMax, rssi_min AS rssiMin, rssi_max AS rssiMax, alt_min AS altMin, alt_max AS altMax, topology_mode AS topologyMode, motion_mode AS motionMode, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM sim_scenarios WHERE scenario_id = #{scenarioId}

SELECT scenario_drone_id AS scenarioDroneId, scenario_id AS scenarioId, drone_no AS droneNo, model_id AS modelId, serial_no AS serialNo, initial_lat AS initialLat, initial_lon AS initialLon, initial_alt AS initialAlt, initial_battery_pct AS initialBatteryPct, initial_rssi AS initialRssi, role_tag AS roleTag FROM sim_scenario_drones WHERE scenario_id = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY drone_no

SELECT scenario_link_id AS scenarioLinkId, scenario_id AS scenarioId, src_drone_no AS srcDroneNo, dst_drone_no AS dstDroneNo, initial_quality AS initialQuality, is_enabled AS isEnabled FROM sim_scenario_links WHERE scenario_id = #{scenarioId} ORDER BY src_drone_no, dst_drone_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sim_scenarios ( name, description, status, drone_count, publish_interval_ms, area_center_lat, area_center_lon, area_radius_m, battery_min, battery_max, rssi_min, rssi_max, alt_min, alt_max, topology_mode, motion_mode, created_by ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{droneCount}, #{publishIntervalMs}, #{areaCenterLat}, #{areaCenterLon}, #{areaRadiusM}, #{batteryMin}, #{batteryMax}, #{rssiMin}, #{rssiMax}, #{altMin}, #{altMax}, #{topologyMode}, #{motionMode}, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sim_scenarios SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, drone_count = #{droneCount}, publish_interval_ms = #{publishIntervalMs}, area_center_lat = #{areaCenterLat}, area_center_lon = #{areaCenterLon}, area_radius_m = #{areaRadiusM}, battery_min = #{batteryMin}, battery_max = #{batteryMax}, rssi_min = #{rssiMin}, rssi_max = #{rssiMax}, alt_min = #{altMin}, alt_max = #{altMax}, topology_mode = #{topologyMode}, motion_mode = #{motionMode} WHERE scenario_id = #{scenarioId}
